form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 7 at Antalya on April 2 over 1300m, 7 len behind Sacansah with 56kg at $3.85. The start before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at Antalya March 19 over 1600m defeating Gurgokbey carrying 56.5kg at $5.90. Going well. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Last start won by 1.75 len at Sirinyer All Weather March 15 over 1400m defeating Guleryuz carrying 54kg at $1.60. The race before that 3rd of 9 at Yesiloba All Weather on February 28 over 1500m, 2.75 len behind Frozen Love carrying 55kg at $1.60. Can get the job done again.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 11 over 2000m defeating Fistik Cami with 58kg at $1.35. Before that favourite; won by a 0.1 len at this track January 24 over 1500m defeating Simsek Yeleli with 56kg at $2.05. Plenty to like about her prospects.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up second last of 9 at this track on March 7 over 1300m, 16 len behind Celikgiller carrying 52kg at $49.10. Last start second last of 15 at this track on April 4 over 1300m, 22 len behind Gul Ayali with 50kg at $65.80. Needs to do more. Others better.

form.formComment: At the latest run crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 5th of 13 at Osmangazi All Weather on April 6 over 1800m, 6 len behind Bolkader with 54kg at $3.50. Before that won by 2.25 len at this track March 25 over 1400m defeating Zemberek carrying 54.5kg at $26.80. Genuine chance this time around.
